response.overview: In the lead up to Big Top Brawl, a film crew was sent out to follow the legendary wrestler and starlet Rusty Busches and her manager/nephew F.W. Busches. The hope was to get some great stories from the territory days of pro wrestling from the living legend, Rusty. What was captured was a little different than expected. Join the Busches family in their sprawling Metro Detroit mansion and see where her head was at as she goes into a career threatening match.
response.title: Grey Busches
